---
author: Pranav
execute: 
    freeze: true
format: 
    revealjs:
        theme: [serif,custom.scss]
        slide-number: true
        css: custom.css
        transition: slide
        transition-speed: default
        chalkboard: true
        margin: 0.1
---

<br>

<br>

<br>

<center> 

::: {style="font-size: 1.75em;"}
**ED 6002: Optimization Methods in Engineering Design (2025-26)**
:::

::: {style="font-size: 1.25em;"}
*Assignment 3 | Pranav D | ns26z167*
:::

</center>

##

### Interval Halving (From Assignment 2)

```{.matlab}
function [a,b,l,k] = inthalving(f,a,b,e)
    if nargin < 5
        e = 0.1;
    end

    xm = (a+b)/2;
    l = b-a;
    k = 0;

    while abs(l) > e
        x1 = a + (l/4);
        x2 = b - (l/4);

        if f(x1) < f(xm)
            b = xm;
            xm = x1;
        elseif f(x2) < f(xm)
            a = xm;
            xm = x2;
        else
            a = x1;
            b = x2;
        end

        l = b-a;
        k = k+1;
    end
end
```

##

### Exponential Search (From Assignment 2)

```{.matlab}
function [a,b,k] = expsearch(f, x_init, d, max_iter)
    if nargin < 4
        max_iter = 100;
    end
    k = 0;
    if f(x_init - abs(d)) >= f(x_init) && f(x_init) >= f(x_init + abs(d))
        d = abs(d);
    elseif f(x_init - abs(d)) <= f(x_init) && f(x_init) <= f(x_init + abs(d))
        d = -abs(d);
    else
        disp("choose diff x_init or d")
        return
    end
    x_k = x_init;
    for i = 1:max_iter
        x_k1 = x_k + (2^k) * d;

        if f(x_k1) < f(x_k)
            k = k + 1;
            x_k = x_k1;
        else
            x_prev = x_k - (2^(k-1)) * d;
            a = min(x_prev, x_k1);
            b = max(x_prev, x_k1);
            return
        end
    end
    disp("max iters")
    a = min(x_prev, x_k1);
    b = max(x_prev, x_k1);
end
```

##

### Wrapper - Combining Exponential Search and Interval Halving

```{.matlab}
function [a,b,l,k_es,k_ih] = wrapper(f, x_init, d, t, max_iter, e)

    if nargin < 5
        max_iter = 100;
    end
    if nargin < 6
        e = 0.1;
    end

    [a_es, b_es, k_es] = expsearch(f, x_init, d, max_iter);
    [a, b, l, k_ih] = inthalving(f, a_es, b_es, e);

end
```

##

### Function Definition - Question

```{.matlab}
function f = myfunction(x)
    x = x(:);
    x1 = x(1);
    x2 = x(2);
    x3 = x(3);
    f = (x1-x2)^2 + (1-x1)^2 + ((2*x1)-x2-x3)^2;
end
```

##

### Derivative at any point

```{.matlab}
function g = derivative(f, x)
    x = x(:);
    n = length(x);
    g = zeros(n,1);
    h = 1e-6;
    for i = 1:n
        x_fwd = x;
        x_bwd = x;
        x_fwd(i) = x_fwd(i) + h;
        x_bwd(i) = x_bwd(i) - h;
        g(i) = (f(x_fwd) - f(x_bwd)) / (2*h);
    end
end
```

##

### Steepest Descent

```{.matlab}
function [x_opt, f_opt, iter] = descent(x0, M, e1, e2)
    if nargin < 2, M = 100; end
    if nargin < 3, e1 = 1e-4; end
    if nargin < 4, e2 = 1e-4; end
    x_k = x0(:);
    k = 0;

    fprintf('\n%-5s | %-26s | %-10s | %-26s | %-10s | %-5s\n', 'iter', 'x_k', 'f(x_k)', 's', 'alpha*', 'n_alpha*');
    fprintf('%s\n', repmat('-', 1, 100)); 
    
    while true
        grad = derivative(@myfunction, x_k);
        f_val = myfunction(x_k); 
        if norm(grad) <= e1
            fprintf('%s\n', repmat('-', 1, 100));
            fprintf('Terminated: ||grad|| (%.6f) <= eps1 at iter %d\n', norm(grad), k);
            break;
        elseif k >= M
            fprintf('%s\n', repmat('-', 1, 100));
            fprintf('Terminated; Max iters\n');
            break;
        end
        
        S = -grad; 
        h = @(alpha) myfunction(x_k + alpha * S);
        alpha_init = 0;
        delta_alpha = 0.1; 
        dummy_t = 0;
        [a, b, l, k_es, k_ih] = wrapper(h, alpha_init, delta_alpha, dummy_t, 100, e2);
        alpha_opt = (a + b) / 2;
        x_str = sprintf('[%6.4f, %6.4f, %6.4f]', x_k(1), x_k(2), x_k(3));
        S_str = sprintf('[%6.4f, %6.4f, %6.4f]', S(1), S(2), S(3));
        
        fprintf('%-5d | %-26s | %-10.4f | %-26s | %-10.4f | %-5d\n', k, x_str, f_val, S_str, alpha_opt, k_es+k_ih+2);
        
        x_next = x_k + alpha_opt * S;
        
        if norm(x_next - x_k) / (norm(x_k) + eps) <= e1
            fprintf('%s\n', repmat('-', 1, 90));
            fprintf('Terminated; x <= eps1 at iter %d\n', k);
            x_k = x_next;
            break;
        end
        
        x_k = x_next;
        k = k + 1;
    end
    x_opt = x_k;
    f_opt = myfunction(x_opt);
    iter = k;
    
    fprintf('\n--- Final Optimization Results ---\n');
    fprintf('Optimal Point: [%.6f; %.6f; %.6f]\n', x_opt(1), x_opt(2), x_opt(3));
    fprintf('Minimum Value: %.6f\n', f_opt);
end
```

##

### Calling the function & Output

```{.matlab}
x0=zeros(3,1);
descent(x0)
```

```{.md}
>> solutions

iter  | x_k                        | f(x_k)     | s                          | alpha*     | n_alpha*
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
0     | [0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000]   | 1.0000     | [2.0000, -0.0000, -0.0000] | 0.0750     | 5    
1     | [0.1500, 0.0000, 0.0000]   | 0.8350     | [0.2000, 0.9000, 0.6000]   | 0.3625     | 7    
2     | [0.2225, 0.3262, 0.2175]   | 0.6250     | [2.1575, -0.4050, -0.1975] | 0.0750     | 5    
3     | [0.3843, 0.2959, 0.2027]   | 0.4598     | [-0.0257, 0.7170, 0.5401]  | 0.1875     | 5    
4     | [0.3795, 0.4303, 0.3040]   | 0.3882     | [1.2439, -0.0523, 0.0494]  | 0.0750     | 5    
5     | [0.4728, 0.4264, 0.3077]   | 0.3248     | [0.1157, 0.5158, 0.4230]   | 0.3250     | 7    
6     | [0.5104, 0.5940, 0.4451]   | 0.2471     | [1.2201, -0.2041, -0.0368] | 0.0750     | 5    
7     | [0.6019, 0.5787, 0.4424]   | 0.1924     | [0.0191, 0.4117, 0.3654]   | 0.2125     | 7    
8     | [0.6060, 0.6662, 0.5200]   | 0.1596     | [0.8059, -0.0691, 0.0514]  | 0.0750     | 5    
9     | [0.6664, 0.6610, 0.5239]   | 0.1332     | [0.0649, 0.3065, 0.2958]   | 0.3250     | 7    
10    | [0.6875, 0.7606, 0.6200]   | 0.1031     | [0.7941, -0.1577, -0.0114] | 0.0750     | 5    
11    | [0.7470, 0.7488, 0.6192]   | 0.0799     | [0.0050, 0.2487, 0.2522]   | 0.2125     | 7    
12    | [0.7481, 0.8017, 0.6727]   | 0.0668     | [0.5236, -0.0635, 0.0436]  | 0.0750     | 5    
13    | [0.7874, 0.7969, 0.6760]   | 0.0557     | [0.0369, 0.1847, 0.2037]   | 0.3250     | 7    
14    | [0.7994, 0.8569, 0.7422]   | 0.0436     | [0.5179, -0.1159, -0.0008] | 0.0750     | 5    
15    | [0.8382, 0.8482, 0.7422]   | 0.0337     | [-0.0006, 0.1521, 0.1721]  | 0.2125     | 7    
16    | [0.8381, 0.8805, 0.7787]   | 0.0283     | [0.3411, -0.0511, 0.0338]  | 0.0750     | 5    
17    | [0.8637, 0.8767, 0.7813]   | 0.0236     | [0.0213, 0.1127, 0.1387]   | 0.3250     | 7    
18    | [0.8706, 0.9133, 0.8264]   | 0.0186     | [0.3383, -0.0825, 0.0030]  | 0.0750     | 5    
19    | [0.8960, 0.9071, 0.8266]   | 0.0143     | [-0.0024, 0.0941, 0.1164]  | 0.2125     | 7    
20    | [0.8954, 0.9271, 0.8513]   | 0.0121     | [0.2226, -0.0384, 0.0249]  | 0.0750     | 5    
21    | [0.9121, 0.9242, 0.8532]   | 0.0101     | [0.0125, 0.0695, 0.0937]   | 0.2875     | 7    
22    | [0.9157, 0.9442, 0.8801]   | 0.0080     | [0.1972, -0.0428, 0.0142]  | 0.0750     | 5    
23    | [0.9305, 0.9410, 0.8812]   | 0.0064     | [0.0047, 0.0566, 0.0776]   | 0.2500     | 7    
24    | [0.9317, 0.9552, 0.9006]   | 0.0053     | [0.1532, -0.0318, 0.0152]  | 0.0750     | 5    
25    | [0.9432, 0.9528, 0.9017]   | 0.0043     | [0.0056, 0.0444, 0.0636]   | 0.2875     | 7    
26    | [0.9448, 0.9656, 0.9200]   | 0.0035     | [0.1361, -0.0336, 0.0079]  | 0.0750     | 5    
27    | [0.9550, 0.9630, 0.9206]   | 0.0028     | [0.0009, 0.0365, 0.0526]   | 0.2125     | 7    
28    | [0.9552, 0.9708, 0.9318]   | 0.0023     | [0.0900, -0.0158, 0.0155]  | 0.0750     | 5    
29    | [0.9619, 0.9696, 0.9330]   | 0.0020     | [0.0065, 0.0271, 0.0425]   | 0.3625     | 7    
30    | [0.9643, 0.9794, 0.9484]   | 0.0015     | [0.0987, -0.0288, 0.0015]  | 0.0750     | 5    
31    | [0.9717, 0.9773, 0.9485]   | 0.0011     | [-0.0026, 0.0240, 0.0352]  | 0.1875     | 5    
32    | [0.9712, 0.9818, 0.9551]   | 0.0010     | [0.0568, -0.0102, 0.0110]  | 0.0750     | 5    
33    | [0.9755, 0.9810, 0.9559]   | 0.0008     | [0.0044, 0.0168, 0.0279]   | 0.3625     | 7    
34    | [0.9771, 0.9871, 0.9660]   | 0.0006     | [0.0622, -0.0182, 0.0019]  | 0.0750     | 5    
35    | [0.9817, 0.9857, 0.9662]   | 0.0005     | [-0.0014, 0.0150, 0.0230]  | 0.1875     | 5    
36    | [0.9815, 0.9885, 0.9705]   | 0.0004     | [0.0358, -0.0065, 0.0077]  | 0.0750     | 5    
37    | [0.9841, 0.9881, 0.9711]   | 0.0004     | [0.0030, 0.0104, 0.0183]   | 0.4000     | 7    
38    | [0.9853, 0.9922, 0.9784]   | 0.0003     | [0.0430, -0.0137, 0.0001]  | 0.0750     | 5    
39    | [0.9886, 0.9912, 0.9784]   | 0.0002     | [-0.0019, 0.0097, 0.0150]  | 0.1875     | 5    
40    | [0.9882, 0.9930, 0.9812]   | 0.0002     | [0.0245, -0.0053, 0.0044]  | 0.0750     | 5    
41    | [0.9901, 0.9926, 0.9815]   | 0.0001     | [0.0014, 0.0067, 0.0118]   | 0.3250     | 7    
42    | [0.9905, 0.9948, 0.9854]   | 0.0001     | [0.0244, -0.0070, 0.0016]  | 0.0750     | 5    
43    | [0.9923, 0.9943, 0.9855]   | 0.0001     | [-0.0002, 0.0058, 0.0097]  | 0.2125     | 7    
44    | [0.9923, 0.9955, 0.9876]   | 0.0001     | [0.0161, -0.0036, 0.0029]  | 0.0750     | 5    
45    | [0.9935, 0.9953, 0.9878]   | 0.0001     | [0.0009, 0.0043, 0.0078]   | 0.3250     | 7    
46    | [0.9938, 0.9967, 0.9903]   | 0.0000     | [0.0160, -0.0047, 0.0011]  | 0.0750     | 5    
47    | [0.9950, 0.9963, 0.9904]   | 0.0000     | [-0.0002, 0.0038, 0.0064]  | 0.2125     | 7    
48    | [0.9949, 0.9971, 0.9918]   | 0.0000     | [0.0106, -0.0024, 0.0019]  | 0.0750     | 5    
49    | [0.9957, 0.9969, 0.9919]   | 0.0000     | [0.0006, 0.0028, 0.0052]   | 0.3250     | 7    
50    | [0.9959, 0.9978, 0.9936]   | 0.0000     | [0.0105, -0.0031, 0.0007]  | 0.0750     | 5    
51    | [0.9967, 0.9976, 0.9937]   | 0.0000     | [-0.0001, 0.0025, 0.0043]  | 0.2125     | 7    
52    | [0.9967, 0.9981, 0.9946]   | 0.0000     | [0.0069, -0.0016, 0.0013]  | 0.0750     | 5    
53    | [0.9972, 0.9980, 0.9947]   | 0.0000     | [0.0004, 0.0018, 0.0034]   | 0.3250     | 7    
54    | [0.9973, 0.9986, 0.9958]   | 0.0000     | [0.0069, -0.0021, 0.0005]  | 0.0750     | 5    
55    | [0.9978, 0.9984, 0.9958]   | 0.0000     | [-0.0001, 0.0016, 0.0028]  | 0.2125     | 7    
56    | [0.9978, 0.9988, 0.9964]   | 0.0000     | [0.0046, -0.0011, 0.0009]  | 0.0750     | 5    
57    | [0.9982, 0.9987, 0.9965]   | 0.0000     | [0.0002, 0.0012, 0.0023]   | 0.3250     | 7    
58    | [0.9982, 0.9991, 0.9972]   | 0.0000     | [0.0045, -0.0014, 0.0003]  | 0.0750     | 5    
59    | [0.9986, 0.9990, 0.9973]   | 0.0000     | [-0.0001, 0.0010, 0.0019]  | 0.2125     | 7    
60    | [0.9986, 0.9992, 0.9976]   | 0.0000     | [0.0030, -0.0007, 0.0006]  | 0.0750     | 5    
61    | [0.9988, 0.9992, 0.9977]   | 0.0000     | [0.0002, 0.0008, 0.0015]   | 0.3250     | 7    
62    | [0.9988, 0.9994, 0.9982]   | 0.0000     | [0.0030, -0.0009, 0.0002]  | 0.0750     | 5    
63    | [0.9991, 0.9993, 0.9982]   | 0.0000     | [-0.0000, 0.0007, 0.0012]  | 0.2125     | 7    
64    | [0.9991, 0.9995, 0.9984]   | 0.0000     | [0.0020, -0.0005, 0.0004]  | 0.0750     | 5    
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Terminated; x <= eps1 at iter 64

--- Final Optimization Results ---
Optimal Point: [0.999207; 0.999446; 0.998477]
Minimum Value: 0.000001

ans =

    0.9992
    0.9994
    0.9985

```
